title: lupinaster eximius
intro: Lupinaster eximius, also known as the shrubby lupin, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lupinaster eximius include its potential to support kidney health, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Lupinaster eximius typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
